summary: Comprehensive testing of LinguaFlow conversation agent voice features completed. Backend APIs show 91.7% success rate with one critical voice endpoint issue. Frontend functionality excellent with 95%+ success across all features including voice/text mode toggle, chat interactions, navigation, and vocabulary management.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Web server timeout error when processing voice messages
critical_bugs.impact: Voice message functionality completely broken - core feature failure

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/scenarios - returns 8 scenarios correctly
Backend API: POST /api/conversations - creates conversations successfully
Backend API: GET /api/conversations - lists conversations
Backend API: POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - text messages with AI responses working
Backend API: GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages - retrieves message history
Backend API: POST /api/tts - text-to-speech returns 85,760 char audio_base64 successfully
Backend API: GET /api/progress - returns comprehensive progress stats
Backend API: POST /api/vocabulary - saves vocabulary words
Backend API: GET /api/vocabulary - lists vocabulary with proper structure
Backend API: DELETE /api/vocabulary/{id} - deletes vocabulary successfully
Backend API: DELETE /api/conversations/{id} - conversation cleanup working
Frontend: Landing page loads all sections (navbar, hero, features, scenarios, CTA, footer)
Frontend: Navigation between pages (/, /chat, /dashboard, /vocabulary) working perfectly
Frontend: Chat page defaults to voice mode with microphone button visible
Frontend: Input mode toggle between voice and text mode working correctly
Frontend: Text mode shows textarea and send button properly
Frontend: Voice mode shows large microphone button as expected
Frontend: Text message sending and AI responses working with 5-8 second response time
Frontend: AI messages display play audio buttons (Volume2 icon) correctly
Frontend: New Chat dropdown shows 8 scenario options
Frontend: Scenario selection (job interview) working
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with stats grid and progress data
Frontend: Vocabulary page add word dialog working
Frontend: Vocabulary word saving and listing functionality working
Frontend: Search functionality in vocabulary page
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix POST /api/conversations/{id}/voice-message endpoint - currently returns 520 timeout error. This breaks the core voice message functionality. Issue likely in Whisper STT processing or server timeout configuration. All other features working excellently.
